info.title: Owner-Builder Project Management API
info.description: Versioned REST API for the Australian owner-builder project management app. All business logic lives behind this API; the web app is just the first client. Money is integer cents (AUD) with explicit GST fields. Compliance content is a checklist aid, not legal advice — verify with the VBA and your relevant building surveyor.

apiKey.description: API key (ob_...) or Supabase session. Machine access uses scoped, revocable API keys.

dueDate.description: ISO date (displayed as DD/MM/YYYY in the UI)

startDate.description: ISO date (displayed as DD/MM/YYYY in the UI)

plannedEnd.description: ISO date (displayed as DD/MM/YYYY in the UI)

validUntil.description: ISO date (displayed as DD/MM/YYYY in the UI)

expiryDate.description: ISO date (displayed as DD/MM/YYYY in the UI)

entryDate.description: ISO date (displayed as DD/MM/YYYY in the UI)

post.summary: Create a project (wizard: seeds stages, budget categories and compliance checklist by state)

get.summary: List tasks (filterable by stageId, status, assignedContactId)

dueDate.description: ISO date (displayed as DD/MM/YYYY in the UI)

patch.summary: Update a task (status flow: todo / in_progress / blocked / done)

get.summary: Budget summary: budget vs committed (accepted quotes + approved variations) vs actual, contingency burn-down, GST

post.summary: Record an actual cost (integer cents, GST-aware)

transactionDate.description: ISO date (displayed as DD/MM/YYYY in the UI)

post.summary: Record a variation (approved variations adjust committed budget)

variationDate.description: ISO date (displayed as DD/MM/YYYY in the UI)

get.summary: List contacts with licences and insurances

post.summary: Add an insurance policy to a contact (expiry drives alerts)

get.summary: List quotes; ?budgetCategoryId=&compare=true returns the side-by-side comparison for a scope

post.summary: Create a quote with optional line items

validUntil.description: ISO date (displayed as DD/MM/YYYY in the UI)

patch.summary: Update a quote (accepting a quote commits its amount against the budget category)

get.summary: Search/filter the document vault (projectId, category, stageId, taskId, contactId, search)

post.summary: Create a document — multipart/form-data with `file` + `meta` (JSON), or JSON metadata only

get.summary: Get a signed, time-limited download URL

post.summary: Create an immutable site diary entry (edits create revisions)

entryDate.description: ISO date (displayed as DD/MM/YYYY in the UI)

post.summary: Create a revision superseding a diary entry (original preserved)
Upload a photo — multipart: file (required), thumbnail (client-resized), caption, stageId, takenAt

get.summary: List inspections (VIC mandatory notification stages seeded at project creation)

patch.summary: Update an inspection (book, complete, record outcome)

get.summary: Dashboard aggregate: current stage, next tasks, upcoming inspections, budget position, expiring items
Full project export as JSON — data is never trapped

patch.summary: Update the model for an AI task type (vision-required tasks reject non-vision models)

post.summary: Create a scoped API key (plaintext returned once)
